query: Gaza ceasefire second phase implementation timeline international security force disarmament status

reasoning: A better enables a correct answer because it contains two core facts that align with the anchor: phase two was announced/started on 14 January 2026, and phase two involves Hamas disarmament plus deployment of an international peacekeeping/security force.
